# Learning Log — Example Project

> Cumulative learning by phase. **No customer data or secrets.**

## Format (abbreviated)

Each phase-close appends a block: objective, outcome, learned patterns, failures, heuristics, next minimal step.

### Phase example — 2026-05-03
